sections.paragraph:
i.q. רָגַל to go about-

(1) for purpose of traffic, i.q. סָחַר; hence to traffic. Part. רֹכֵל a merchant, Eze 27:13, 15 Eze 27:15, 17 Eze 27:17, seqq.; fem. רֹכֶלֶת a female merchant, ibid. 3:20, 23. Hence the substantives רְכֻלָּה, מַרְכֹּלֶת.

(2) for the sake of slandering, whence רָכִיל slander.
